title: alnus firma var. sieboldiana
intro: Alnus firma var. sieboldiana, also known as Japanese black alder, is a variant of the Alnus firma plant species, native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts are sometimes used in pharmaceutical applications.
